title: hieracium nigrescens subsp. nutatulum
intro: Hieracium nigrescens subsp. nutatulum, also known as the lesser hawkweed or hieracium, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion family. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Hieracium nigrescens subsp. nutatulum include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues, making it a popular choice in herbal remedies. The herbal preparations of Hieracium nigrescens subsp. nutatulum typically include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
